item.title: The state of Tools in 2026
item.description: A field report on tools: where things stand, and what hobby leatherworkers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Patterns without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to patterns for hobby leatherworkers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "leathercraft starter tools" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "leathercraft starter tools" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why hobby leatherworkers are rethinking Stitching
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how hobby leatherworkers approach stitching — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Finishing on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in finishing — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Patterns: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping patterns for hobby leatherworkers.
